description: This leatherworking pattern is used for the Leatherworking profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Leatherworking Patterns category. An item.
name: Pattern: Drums of Battle

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Pattern: Drums of Battle Item Level 73 Binds when picked up Requires Leatherworking (365) Requires The Sha'tar - Honored Use: Teaches you how to make Drums of Battle. Sell Price: 3 Drums of Battle Item Level 73 Requires Leatherworking (350) Use: Increases melee, ranged and spell haste rating on nearby party members by 80. Lasts 30 sec. (2 Min Cooldown) 50 Charges Sell Price: 50 Requires Heavy Knothide Leather (6), Thick Clefthoof Leather (4) This leatherworking pattern is used for the Leatherworking profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Leatherworking Patterns category. An item.
